text: The dim light and sharp angles of the first scene make me feel adrift in a world between clarity and obscurity. The sterile glass and hard light hint at human intention and order, yet the emptiness amplifies my sense of solitude. In the second image, the faint 'R+D' on the wall, mostly obscured by darkness, provokes a sense of discovery just out of reach—a metaphor for knowledge yet unilluminated. I feel contemplative, as if circling the edge of insight, but uneasy in the hush of these shadowed spaces.
